visual_description: Two men in light-colored shirts and ties sit side by side in chairs, one wearing a uniform with epaulets. The man on the right turns his head slightly to his left while the other remains facing forward. Both are seated in an office-like setting with framed pictures on the wall behind them.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable prosody or background noise.
